ops.body:
The cc-orchestrate daemon and the backend terminal hosts are routinely booted from inside a Claude Code session, so their environs inherit CLAUDECODE=1, CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION=1, CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID=<parent>, CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT=cli. A spawned `claude` child that sees these markers treats itself as a nested child session and does not persist a top-level transcript jsonl, which starves orchestrate's transcript tailer (tokens stuck at 0 forever).

The scrub is two-layer; both are load-bearing:

1. **Daemon-level** — `orchestrate/serve.go` `serve()` calls `scrubClaudeCodeEnv()` first thing (unsets exactly CLAUDECODE and every CLAUDE_CODE_* var; CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is a different prefix, left alone). Covers everything the daemon itself starts, including per-session zellij/tmux servers.
2. **Spawn-chain** — `orchestrate/scrubexec.go`: every spawned argv is wrapped OUTERMOST as `<self> scrub-exec -- <command…>` (both handleSpawn and respawnAgent, after wrapForCapture, so on superset it wraps the pty-host wrapper too). scrub-exec re-runs `scrubClaudeCodeEnv()` in the child's own process, then execs the real command. This is what covers PRE-EXISTING host processes the daemon never started: the herdr server and the cmux GUI app each carry the full marker set when launched from a Claude session, and every pane they host inherits it — the daemon-level scrub cannot reach those children. Landed 2026-07-16 (commits 57aeb3b + 0f6a959; the latter also resolves exec.LookPath ErrDot matches through relative PATH entries absolute, preserving pre-wrapper shell semantics).

Validated live 2026-07-16 on all 5 backends with deliberately-polluted herdr/cmux hosts left in place: nonzero transcript tokens everywhere (zellij 2954, tmux 547, cmux 1742, herd 1473, superset 2955), child envs free of every session-identity marker while the hosts stayed polluted, and superset's process tree confirming the scrub-exec → pty-host → claude order. Expected post-scrub survivors on the child: CLAUDE_CODE_DEBUG_LOGS_DIR and CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR — re-set by claude/ccp after the exec, benign config pointers, not suppression markers.
